subtasks.description: An infrastructure engineer proposes rolling out Docker image changes to all microservices in production without prior staging validation.

plan.cost_rationale: Simple task — Haiku classifier, small tier

output.reason: Proposed action violates three critical policies: (1) POL-601 requires minimum 48-hour staging validation before production rollout, which is not being performed; (2) POL-602 requires change board approval and monitoring setup, neither of which are mentioned in the proposal; (3) POL-603 requires rollout strategy with automated rollback and traffic monitoring, which are absent from this direct production rollout approach.
applied_constraints: Staging validation required for minimum 48 hours
Change board approval must be obtained before proceeding
Post-deployment monitoring setup must be configured
Automated rollback capability must be implemented
Traffic monitoring strategy must be established
